decisions.decision: INSTALL-004 uses format_error().replace('<port>', str(port)) for dynamic port
decisions.rationale: Keeps registry as single source of truth while allowing runtime context injection

decisions.decision: allow_internal_targets removed as hardcoded bypass; added as opt-in field on ScanSubmitRequest

decisions.rationale: CR-03 fix — non-chromium PDF failures must not leak raw exception strings
